rollback: Revert version 0.12.4 release delivery dedupe, tests, phase record, manifest, event, and restore version 0.12.3 while keeping production variables disabled.
risks: A third default-branch workflow_dispatch is required to prove real Release creation and Gmail SMTP send.

SMTP can still fail if the Gmail app password or provider policy rejects authentication.
Scheduled production remains blocked until manual Release and SMTP evidence passes and the owner separately approves production variables.
